statement.title: We don't sell templates. We build digital products with engineering rigor and a design eye.
statement.body: We're a technical-creative team based in Medellín. We work with startups, SMBs, and companies across Latin America that need a serious partner to build and grow their digital presence.

servicesGrid.title: Everything your brand needs to grow online

web.title: Web Development
web.body: WordPress, Shopify, Next.js, React, and hand-written code. Fast, secure, custom-built sites.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.body: Stores that sell. Optimized checkout, payment integrations, and logistics.

seo.title: AI-Powered Technical SEO
seo.body: An AI-driven methodology to rank your brand at the top of search results.

automation.title: AI Automation
automation.body: Smart agents and workflows that save your team hours every week.

crm.title: CRM Implementation & Development
crm.body: We implement HubSpot, Zoho, or Pipedrive — or build a custom CRM. Pipelines, sales automation, and dashboards connected to your site.

saas.title: SaaS Platforms
saas.body: Scalable enterprise products, from MVP to large-scale operation.

ai.title: Technical SEO and automation powered by artificial intelligence
ai.body: We combine human judgment with AI agents to research, produce, and rank at a speed manual work can't match.

seo.title: Rankings that last
seo.lead: Measurable organic growth, not smoke and mirrors. Every decision is backed by data.

01.title: Technical Audit
01.body: Core Web Vitals, indexing, structure, and performance. We fix what's holding your rankings back.

02.title: Intent-Driven Content
02.body: Topic clusters built around your customers' real search intent.

03.title: Authority & Links
03.body: A sustainable link-building and domain authority strategy — no penalty-prone tricks.

ortotex.quote: The redesign and technical SEO got us out of obscurity. Today distributors find us, not the other way around.

grassranch.quote: We went from a PDF catalog to a store that sells itself. The optimized checkout shows up in the revenue.

kreatup.quote: They connected the site to our CRM and we stopped losing opportunities in email. Every lead arrives with context.

cervantes.quote: My patients book on their own, reminders are automatic, and my assistant got half a workday back every week.

coldcare.quote: They understood a niche market in English and Spanish. Site speed and international SEO did the rest.

elevator.quote: AI automation took repetitive reporting work off our plate. The team now focuses on strategy.

stack.title: Technology we use to build results
stack.lead: We master the platforms your business already uses — and the ones it should — so you're never locked into a single tool.

hero.sub: A technical-creative team that designs, builds, and automates digital growth for companies across the region.

manifesto.title: We don't build templates. We build systems.
paragraphs: Every business is different, so every solution is too. We start by understanding your operation, your customers, and your goals before writing a single line of code.
We combine four disciplines in one team: strategy, technology, design, and automation. We don't outsource or separate them, because the result lives in how they connect.
We build with engineering judgment: fast, secure, and maintainable. And we measure everything, because a pretty site that doesn't convert doesn't help anyone.
That's the beleaf system: a digital product that grows with you, not one that stands still on launch day.

personalization.title: Tailored solutions
personalization.body: No templates: every project is built for your business.

ai.title: AI from day one
ai.body: Artificial intelligence built into design, content, and operations.

performance.title: Performance-first approach
performance.body: Speed, Core Web Vitals, and code that scales without slowing you down.

businessFocus.title: Design aligned to business
businessFocus.body: Aesthetics with purpose: every decision points to a result.

automation.title: Process automation
automation.body: We free your team from repetitive tasks.

strategy.title: Strategy and technique together
strategy.body: We think through the business and execute it with engineering judgment.

2025.title: 80+ projects delivered
2025.body: Six industries, one same standard of quality.

hero.sub: Sites, stores, and systems that move real numbers.
hero.intro: We don't show pretty templates: we show businesses that grew with the right technology in place. Every project starts from a measurable goal and ends in something the client can operate and scale.

tienda-cafe-retail.title: Single-origin coffee store
tienda-cafe-retail.desc: Custom Shopify build with local payments and CRM: from farm sales to orders across 12 cities.

agenda-clinica-salud.desc: Scheduling, medical records, and automatic reminders for 4 locations in a single workflow.

agente-ia-whatsapp.title: AI booking agent on WhatsApp
agente-ia-whatsapp.desc: 24/7 support that quotes, books, and logs every guest in the hotel's CRM.

seo-b2b-ortotex.title: Technical SEO for a B2B manufacturer
seo-b2b-ortotex.desc: New architecture, green Core Web Vitals, and content built around purchase intent.

automatizacion-leads-crm.title: Unified sales pipeline
automatizacion-leads-crm.desc: Every lead from sales offices tracked with rep, stage, and source — zero lost opportunities.

identidad-cafe-cumbre.title: Identity for an export coffee brand
identidad-cafe-cumbre.desc: Brand, packaging, and visual system to go from the farm to international shelves.

rediseno-wordpress-pyme.title: WordPress redesign + local SEO
rediseno-wordpress-pyme.desc: A fast site ranking in its city, ready for the team to manage on its own.
